title: Berlin Film Festival to Run From Feb. 10-21 Next Year, Starting a Day Earlier Than in the Past
summary: Next year’s edition of the Berlin Film Festival will run from Feb. 10-21, and will therefore begin on a Wednesday, one day earlier than in the past. The awards ceremony will be held on the second Friday, Feb. 19. The changed start date opens up additional space to introduce the first ever two Audie…
